---
title: "Multivariable calculus: Exercises"
toc: true
---

# 17 Lagrange multipliers

Attempt as many of problems 1-17 odd in [this](./text/17ex-lagrange-multipliers.pdf){target="_blank"} file. The solutions are [here](./text/17ex-lagrange-multipliers-sol.pdf){target="_blank"}, under the heading Section 15.3.
